primary_target: Convert I-0196 dashboard into a 40-pass readiness roadmap.
exit_gate: Roadmap has exact pass targets, gates, and no count inflation.

primary_target: Create lightweight TSV templates and directory conventions for captures, hashes, rights notes, and failures.
exit_gate: Future capture rows can be filled mechanically without committing heavy assets.

primary_target: Capture 5 product/interface exhibits from I-0193.
evidence_required: Raster hashes, source URLs/titles, timestamps, captions, rights notes for 5 rows
exit_gate: No adoption/revenue/productivity inference enters captions.

primary_target: Capture frontier model/product pages for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Qwen, DeepSeek, and related source surfaces.
evidence_required: At least 6 additional selected or replacement source surfaces hashed and captioned
exit_gate: Mutable/current UI and live-rank claims remain blocked.

primary_target: Capture Chapter 20 coding-agent surfaces: Claude Code, SWE-bench, terminal/IDE loops, repository harnesses.
evidence_required: Coding-agent screenshot/source rows with permission and autonomy blockers
exit_gate: Chapter 20 has at least one concrete source surface ready or replacement-ready.

primary_target: Capture or card-design benchmark surfaces for SWE-bench, LM Arena, MMLU-era, and reasoning/eval sources.
exit_gate: No live-crown, productivity, or broad-intelligence claim is allowed.

primary_target: Capture or card-design tokenizer, Common Crawl/C4, The Pile/Dolma/FineWeb, deduplication, and provenance caution surfaces.
evidence_required: Data source surfaces include source/page/hash/quote limits
exit_gate: No closed-corpus, legal, exact-share, or leakage prevalence claim is implied.

primary_target: Produce foundational redraws for Transformer, attention, scaling, GPT lineage, and RLHF.
evidence_required: SVGs or redraw specs with paper page refs and rights notes
exit_gate: Chapters 2-5 each gain at least one page-provenance-backed exhibit candidate.

primary_target: Produce Constitutional AI, tool use, retrieval, SWE-bench, agent scaffold, and reasoning diagrams.
evidence_required: House-style SVGs or executable specs with source IDs and blockers
exit_gate: Late technical diagrams preserve task/tool/sample/cost caveats.

primary_target: Produce data/open-frontier redraws: dedup, contamination, mixtures, open weights, model cards.
exit_gate: Open/frontier visuals show mechanism gates rather than logo/rank inflation.

primary_target: Verify licenses/attribution/revision notes for selected ASML, cleanroom, rack, substation, gas, nuclear, and datacenter photos.
evidence_required: License rows, author, revision, attribution, commercial-use notes for 7 selected photos
exit_gate: No physical photo remains selected with unknown rights.

primary_target: Create original SVG/schematic alternatives for risky physical photos.
evidence_required: Replacement candidates for any photo not cleared in I-0207
exit_gate: Every high-risk photo has a rights-safe substitute path.

primary_target: Add or replace roughly 8 early technical exhibits for embeddings, attention, Transformer, scaling, GPT/API/Codex.
exit_gate: Chapters 2-5 each reach 3-4 strong candidates without late-book filler.

primary_target: Align RLHF, ChatGPT, Microsoft/OpenAI, and Google visuals; prune duplicated launch/Plus surfaces.
exit_gate: No launch/product screenshot appears in two chapters without a distinct job.

primary_target: Prune Meta, China, Anthropic, rest-frontier, and rankings visuals into a coherent map.
exit_gate: Leaderboard and frontier visuals remain methodology/source-surface led.

primary_target: Prune overfull NVIDIA/power visuals into chip, rack, keynote, datacenter, power chain.
evidence_required: Chapter 14-16 visual sequence board and drop/reserve records
exit_gate: No GTC/raw slide duplication; Chapter 16 uses independent evidence for physical claims.

primary_target: Make data, agents, coding, and Claude Code visuals feel like one rising system.
exit_gate: Agent/code diagrams have distinct trust-boundary, harness, and repository jobs.

primary_target: Choose reasoning/economics/trust/finale visuals that sustain late-book tension.
exit_gate: Ending does not collapse into dashboards or generic summary art.

primary_target: Classify every selected exhibit as scene, mechanism, evidence, comparison, or source texture.
exit_gate: No chapter has monotonous exhibit roles without a recorded reason.

primary_target: Write/QA captions so every selected exhibit teaches one thing and blocks one risk.
exit_gate: Every selected row has concise caption, source hook, and blocked-claim note.

primary_target: Verify source IDs, access dates, rights status, manifest rows, and blocked claims.
evidence_required: Attribution QA table with defects and fixes
exit_gate: Zero selected rows with missing provenance, rights status, story purpose, or blocker.

primary_target: Finalize typography, palette, line weights, source-card style, figure labels, and contrast rules.
exit_gate: All visual families can be judged against one house system.

primary_target: Inspect SVG/chart exhibits for print/PDF readability, axes, footnotes, source labels, contrast.
evidence_required: Chart QA table and defect fixes
exit_gate: No selected chart has unreadable small text or missing source/caveat labels.

primary_target: Inspect screenshots/source surfaces for crop, resolution, PII/secrets, quote limits, caption neutrality.
exit_gate: All selected screenshots are either book-grade, replaced, or dropped.

primary_target: Produce strongest 10 source-excerpt cards with quote-limit checks and page/source provenance.
exit_gate: Quote limits and paraphrase fallbacks are recorded before manifest promotion.

primary_target: Produce surprising/fun source cards: launch lines, benchmark caveats, model warnings, infrastructure phrasing.
exit_gate: Cards add texture without copyright, rank, safety, adoption, or productivity leakage.

primary_target: Choose/design first 3 exhibits and one unforgettable opening visual.
evidence_required: Opening visual package and render check
exit_gate: First visual sequence sells premise and preserves evidence lanes.

primary_target: Define recurring visual motifs: tokens, power, time, prompts, chips, context, agency.
exit_gate: Motifs recur for meaning, not decoration or filler.

primary_target: Create master timeline and chapter-local timeline strips through May 24, 2026.
exit_gate: No post-cutoff event appears as happened history.

primary_target: Create institutional map for labs, funders, suppliers, benchmarks, open ecosystems.
exit_gate: Map does not imply equivalence, adoption, funding amounts, or dominance without sources.

primary_target: Create signature system diagram linking user demand, inference, chips, networking, cooling, power, software.
exit_gate: Spread separates NVIDIA rhetoric from independent physical constraints.

primary_target: Create diagrams/charts for tokens, context, pricing, compute, latency, routing, marginal cost.
evidence_required: Same-scope economics source table and visuals
exit_gate: No price-quality, margin, ROI, cost-per-token, or revenue claim lacks matching evidence.

primary_target: Assign stable figure IDs, chapter anchors, alt text, source IDs, and final/pending status.
exit_gate: Every selected/final exhibit has stable ID and cross-reference status.

primary_target: Render sample pages for SVGs, screenshots, source cards, photos, dense captions.
exit_gate: No visual family proceeds to full render with unresolved systemic defects.

primary_target: Place representative exhibits through all chapters and measure rhythm, whitespace, orphans, fatigue.
exit_gate: Full-book visual rhythm is proven by spread-level evidence, not intent.

primary_target: Benchmark against Chip War, The Prize, Isaacson-style bios, The Thinking Machine, and AI/business books.
exit_gate: Next Token has explicit standards for maps, charts, openings, images, and source surfaces.

primary_target: Mark where visuals raise suspense, surprise, delight, or clarity; remove slowing visuals.
exit_gate: Every major visual has a reader-effect job beyond quota.

primary_target: Rewrite paragraphs before/after key exhibits so visuals land as story beats.
exit_gate: Key exhibits are introduced and paid off in prose, not dropped into layout.

primary_target: Classify every selected exhibit as publish, redraw, replace, permission-needed, fair-use-review, or drop.
exit_gate: No selected exhibit remains ambiguous on publication path.

primary_target: Recompute dashboard after capture, redraw, caption, rights, and render work.
evidence_required: Updated readiness dashboard and final blockers
exit_gate: 99% readiness is accepted only if evidence proves it; otherwise the next blockers are explicit.
